options.command: pnpm tsc -p tsconfig.user-service.json && pnpm tsc-alias -p tsconfig.user-service.json
npx cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.test.json npx mocha -r ts-node/register/transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/user-service/tests/unit/**/*.spec.ts --timeout 15000
npx cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.test.json npx mocha -r ts-node/register/transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/user-service/tests/integration/**/*.spec.ts --timeout 15000
npx cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.test.json npx mocha -r ts-node/register/transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/user-service/tests/e2e/**/*.spec.ts --timeout 30000
